scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=mcp-server
scripts.test:free-contracts: npm run test --workspace=mcp-server -- product-entitlements product-tiers product-surfaces tools/index premium-library
scripts.release:free-mirror:gate: npm run build && npm run test:free-contracts && npm run verify:free-mirror && npm run prepare:free-mirror && npm run verify:free-release
